subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath caused His light to shine forth from the Dayspring of the horizons, and hath gladdened, through its contemplation, the eyes of the people of effulgence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اشرق نوره من مطلع الافاق و قرت بمشاهدته اعین اهل الاشراق و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for governments and rulers, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
